visual_description: In a glass-walled conference room, several men sit around a dark table while a man in a white shirt and tie stands at the head. The camera then cuts to a close-up of a man in a police uniform speaking. The standing man points toward a television screen displaying a hallway view.
audio_description: The audio contains spoken dialogue from the participants, with the standing man gesturing as he talks.
